## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, pipeline updates, and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Pipeline:** A new pipeline is live, delivering two articles this week with a "step change improvement" in quality.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [**Aggressive Refresh Cadence:** A 3-month refresh cadence was set for all articles to ensure content stays current with Logic's fast-moving product and industry.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - **Strong Early SEO Signals:** New articles are indexing in hours, and the "LangGraph Alternatives" post already ranks \#8, validating the new content strategy.
  - [**New Content Asset:** A long-form "How to Build an Agent" guide will be published as an ungated, premium asset to drive SEO and establish authority.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Quality

  - [A new content pipeline is live, delivering two articles this week.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [The first new article is due tomorrow; Rachel (Logic) noted a "step change improvement" in quality.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [**Action:** Azzam to review \~5 articles in the old pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
      - [If quality is poor → flag for Rachel to rerun through the new pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
      - [Rationale → Avoid wasting time on granular edits for content that doesn't align with the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [This week's content will mix net-new articles with refreshes of high-performing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [**Goal:** Test the refresh pipeline's ability to update content with new positioning without hurting existing SEO rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [**Decision:** Prioritize correct messaging over preserving outdated SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
      - [Rationale → The primary goal is to tell the right story, and these articles aren't direct conversion drivers.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [**New SLA:** A 3-month refresh cadence was set for all articles.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [Rationale → Logic's product and industry move too quickly for content to stay relevant longer.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [Process → Airtable reminders will trigger the refresh cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [**SEO Tactic:** Update the `published_at` date in StoryBlock during refreshes to signal freshness to search engines.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)

### "How to Build an Agent" Guide

  - [Logic is creating a long-form guide to establish authority and drive SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [**Format:** An ungated, premium asset (like the Aeroops report example) living outside the main blog.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - **Goal:** Outrank the current \#1 Google result for the target keyword.
  - [**Action:** GrowthX to review the guide and provide feedback on structure and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)

### Reporting & Integrations

  - [**Statsig Access:** Azzam will add Bailey as a Statsig user to track content-to-conversion attribution.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**Image API:** Logic will provide an API key for the image generation service to automate content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [**Check That Tool:** A Loom walkthrough is coming this week, with logins next week.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
      - [Rationale → Check That's superior contextual understanding will provide more accurate LLM visibility scores than the previous tool (Scrunch).](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)

### January Performance & SEO Signals

  - [**Fast Indexing:** New articles are indexing within hours, a strong positive signal.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [**Strong Keyword Rankings:**](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
      - "LangGraph Alternatives" → \#8
      - "Make.com Alternatives" → \#14
  - [**LLM Visibility:** 0.5% visibility is driven by citations of specific blog posts (e.g., "e-commerce content moderation") and case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [**Key Insight:** "Alternatives" and listicle-style posts are driving outsized traffic and conversion lifts.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Azzam:**](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)

      - [Add Bailey as a user in Statsig.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [Provide an API key for the image generation service.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
      - [Deliver the first new article tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
      - [Update the agentic cluster strategy and KPIs this week.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [Record and send the Check That tool walkthrough.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
      - [Review the "How to Build an Agent" guide and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
      - [Ensure the `published_at` date is updated during all content refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/s-j6AewsEyvEjWMv3eEHj7PLjVAcxo76?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
